title: Twiddlefinger Dweller/TwiddleDweller
description: A parody take on Cave Dwellers, featuring Max from Twiddlefinger—yes, the parody character from the canceled FNF mod Jeffy's Endless Aethos. Because if I can't make a parody mod... I'll add a parody of a parody instead. For Minecraft Java 1.20.1
body:
In the overworld, where danger once lurked in shadows and silence, a new kind of nightmare stirs—not ancient, not cursed... but weirdly familiar.

This mod is a parody of the notorious Cave Dwellers concept, but instead of terrifying cryptids or forgotten beasts, you’ll be stalked by Max from ****Twiddlefinger.**** Who is Max, you ask? He’s not just any random entity—he’s a parody of a parody, originally from the canceled Friday Night Funkin’ mod Jeffy's Endless Aethos. That’s right: a character that never officially saw the light of day... until now.

Make no mistake—this mod was added purely as a joke. A complete joke. Don’t take it seriously, just enjoy the chaos.

Also, there’s a gameplay mechanic inspired by that one mod that got famous for trying to be scary… you know, the one kinda based on a squirrel game? Or maybe not? It’s a bit confusing, but somehow it fits here.

Because if I couldn't make a parody mod… I figured, why not add a parody of a parody, with a weird mechanic borrowed from who-knows-where?





This is Obviously, ****this requieres geckolib****
